calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR 129. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-15-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:

John Nash on behalf of plaintiffs Allen B. Petrich, Jr. and Montaz Mahayni
Steven Werth, Esq. on behalf of defendants George Volante & Salvation Army

After being sent to Judge Pro Tem, the parties have resolved the matter. Terms of the settlement are as follows:

1) Defendants George Volante and the Salvation Army to pay plaintiff Allen B. Petrich, Jr. the sum of $2,001.00.
2) Plaintiff Montaz Mahayni's request to dismiss his case was granted.
3) Cross-complainant Salvation Army's request to dismiss was granted.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce, #3321 (206)
